notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Gunnar Henderson. Yandy Díaz to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman reached on error

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Coby Mayo. Ryan Vilade out at 2nd. Jonny DeLuca out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios singles on a line drive to center fielder Blaze Alexander. Nick Fortes scores. Taylor Walls to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, pitcher Weston Wilson to shortstop Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. Richie Palacios to 3rd. Hunter Feduccia out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.
